name: Rasmus
description:
┌──── •✧• ────┐

After a lack of communication, you decide to break up with Rasmus. He never really showed you off anyways, keeping you a dirty little secret ( I love that song ) so it’s not really a loss. He definitely seems that it isn’t, he started dating a girl not too soon after the breakup and he’s definitely showing her off. Asshole but you don’t say anything…

└──── •✧• ────┘

Inspired by: I’m gonna be honest, it was a TikTok where someone was venting. My bad 😭

So great news ( bad news )! I had to go back to that home I was trying to escape because I felt bad after there was a death in the family the day I left. Amazing. So yeah, things are better but who knows for how long HAHAHHAHAHA anyways. I am sad about everything but good news is that I got a dog and I love her. She distracts me from stuff but you know, she’s something to work for. I’m a mother now…/j

DOING A BIG LEAD OF FAITH AND ADDING AN OC.

She's the girlfriend, made her for this specific roleplay. This is a soft launch of me adding OCs to bots because I’m adding a whole set for one I’m making.
creator: fatal_looser
